description: Performs a recover operation on alerts.

outputs.description: The list of alert IDs successfully marked for recovery. GSuiteSecurityAlert.Recover.failedAlerts.id The list of alert IDs failed to be marked for recovery.
outputs.name: GSuiteSecurityAlert.Recover.successAlerts.id

outputs.description: The status code of the failed alerts to be recovered. GSuiteSecurityAlert.Recover.failedAlerts.message A developer-facing error message for the failed alerts.
outputs.name: GSuiteSecurityAlert.Recover.failedAlerts.code

outputs.description: Status of the successful alert recovery. GSuiteSecurityAlert.Recover.failedAlerts.status Status of the failed alert recovery.
outputs.name: GSuiteSecurityAlert.Recover.successAlerts.status
Note: The gsac-alert-recover command returns a custom context that contains the status key that shows the status of the alert ID marked for recovery.
